mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN ANSWER_STATUS = 'Y' THEN '문의 완료' WHEN ANSWER_STATUS = 'N' THEN '문의중' END AS ANSWER_STATUS_TEXT, INQUIRY_NUMBER, INQUIRY_TITLE, TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INQUIRY_DATE, USER_NUMBER FROM DDD_INQUIRY WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY INQUIRY_NUMBER DESC

SELECT INQUIRY_NUMBER, INQUIRY_TITLE, TO_CHAR(INQUIRY_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS INQUIRY_DATE, INQUIRY_POST, ANSWER_STATUS, TO_CHAR(ANSWER_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS ANSWER_DATE, ANSWER_POST FROM DDD_INQUIRY WHERE INQUIRY_NUMBER = #{inquiryNumber} AND USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_INQUIRY ( INQUIRY_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, INQUIRY_TITLE, INQUIRY_POST, INQUIRY_DATE, ANSWER_STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_INQUIRY.NEXTVAL, #{userNumber}, #{inquiryTitle}, #{inquiryPost}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
